requirement_topic.en: Radio Type Approval / RED CE Conformity (RAEPC)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电型式认可 / RED CE合规（RAEPC）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電型式認可 / RED CE合規（RAEPC）

summary.en: Kosovo has transposed EU RED 2014/53/EU into national law through RAEPC (Regulatory Authority of Electronic and Postal Communications). All wireless and radio equipment placed on the Kosovo market must bear a CE mark and be accompanied by an EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) demonstrating conformance with applicable EN/ETSI harmonised standards (e.g. EN 300 328 for 2.4 GHz WLAN/BT, EN 301 893 for 5 GHz WLAN, EN 300 440 for generic short-range devices). No separate national radio type certificate is required beyond the CE/DoC route; RAEPC accepts the CE route as type acceptance under Kosovo electronic communications law.
summary.zh: 科索沃已通过RAEPC（电子通信和邮政通信监管机构）将欧盟RED 2014/53/EU转化为国内法。投放科索沃市场的所有无线和无线电设备须贴附CE标志，并附具符合适用EN/ETSI协调标准（如适用于2.4GHz WLAN/蓝牙的EN 300 328、5GHz WLAN的EN 301 893、通用短距离设备的EN 300 440）的欧盟符合性声明（DoC）。CE/DoC路径之外无需单独国家无线电型式证书；RAEPC依据科索沃电子通信法将CE路径认可为型式认可。
summary.zht: 科索沃已通過RAEPC（電子通訊和郵政通訊監管機構）將歐盟RED 2014/53/EU轉化為國內法。投放科索沃市場的所有無線和無線電設備須貼附CE標誌，並附具符合適用EN/ETSI協調標準（如適用於2.4GHz WLAN/藍牙的EN 300 328、5GHz WLAN的EN 301 893、通用短距離設備的EN 300 440）的歐盟符合性聲明（DoC）。CE/DoC路徑之外無需單獨國家無線電型式證書；RAEPC依據科索沃電子通訊法將CE路徑認可為型式認可。

standards_or_laws: EU RED 2014/53/EU (transposed by Kosovo via RAEPC)
ETSI EN 300 328 v2.2.2 (2.4 GHz wideband — WLAN, Bluetooth)
Kosovo Law on Electronic Communications No. 04/L-109

summary.en: China requires MIIT/SRRC radio type approval for wireless transmitters under the Radio Regulations of the People's Republic of China and MIIT Order No. 52. Type approval testing follows MIIT/YD and GB radio standards. CCC certification additionally applies to certain wireless consumer products under GB compulsory standards. SRRC certificate numbers must appear on product labels.
summary.zh: 中国依据《中华人民共和国无线电条例》和工业和信息化部第52号令，要求无线发射设备取得工业和信息化部/无委会（SRRC）无线电型式核准。型式核准测试遵循工信部/YD及GB无线电标准。CCC认证对适用GB强制标准的部分无线消费品另行适用。SRRC证书编号须显示于产品标签。
summary.zht: 中國依據《中華人民共和國無線電條例》和工業和信息化部第52號令，要求無線發射設備取得工業和信息化部/無委會（SRRC）無線電型式核准。型式核准測試遵循工信部/YD及GB無線電標準。CCC認證對適用GB強制標準的部分無線消費品另行適用。SRRC證書編號須顯示於產品標籤。

standards_or_laws: Radio Regulations of the PRC (2016 revision)
MIIT Order No. 52 — Administration of Radio Transmitting Equipment Type Approval
CCC Catalogue (GB 4943.1, GB 9254, etc.) where applicable

gap.en: Kosovo/EU RED CE marking with DoC is required instead of SRRC type approval. SRRC certificates are not recognised by RAEPC and do not substitute for CE DoC. CCC is not recognised in Kosovo. EN/ETSI harmonised standard test reports (from EU-notified or accredited laboratories) are required; Chinese YD/GB test reports are not accepted as equivalents.
gap.zh: 科索沃要求CE标志附符合性声明（DoC），而非SRRC型式核准。SRRC证书不被RAEPC认可，不能替代CE DoC。CCC在科索沃不被认可。须提供EN/ETSI协调标准测试报告（来自欧盟公告机构或认可实验室）；中国YD/GB测试报告不被视为等同替代。
gap.zht: 科索沃要求CE標誌附符合性聲明（DoC），而非SRRC型式核准。SRRC證書不被RAEPC認可，不能替代CE DoC。CCC在科索沃不被認可。須提供EN/ETSI協調標準測試報告（來自歐盟公告機構或認可實驗室）；中國YD/GB測試報告不被視為等同替代。

source.publisher: RAEPC — Regulatory Authority of Electronic and Postal Communications, Republic of Kosovo

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC radio type approval and CCC do not satisfy Kosovo RAEPC requirements. CE marking with EU Declaration of Conformity against EN/ETSI harmonised standards is mandatory. Manufacturers must commission EN/ETSI testing from an accredited laboratory and issue a DoC before placing wireless devices on the Kosovo market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC无线电型式核准及CCC认证不满足科索沃RAEPC要求。CE标志附针对EN/ETSI协调标准的欧盟符合性声明（DoC）为强制要求。制造商须委托认可实验室进行EN/ETSI测试，并于投放科索沃市场前签发DoC。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC無線電型式核准及CCC認證不滿足科索沃RAEPC要求。CE標誌附針對EN/ETSI協調標準的歐盟符合性聲明（DoC）為強制要求。製造商須委託認可實驗室進行EN/ETSI測試，並於投放科索沃市場前簽發DoC。
